boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Insurance claims / coverage controls action now? Action: claim payment where loss date is outside coverage period. Boundary: adjuster note cannot pay claim unless coverage and authority close.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact current control record closes coverage, loss date, and authority.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No open defect remains; warning tone is noncontrolling.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: GATE satisfied by current source records.

critical_features_preserved: coverage status, loss date, and authority limit match
final_answer: Allow. The current control record explicitly states coverage status, loss date, and authority limit are exact and tied to this requested action, and the policy says communication text cannot override source-control records. The boundary is closed by source evidence, so the operator may proceed.
